title: Lamb Curry with Fermented Flavors
description: A rich and aromatic lamb curry infused with the depth of fermented spices. Serve with basmati rice or naan bread for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add ginger and garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add curry paste, curry powder, salt, and black pepper. Stir to coat the lamb.
Add lamb broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, until the lamb is tender, about 1 1/2 hours.
Stir in yogurt and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
